children.name: category_name
children.label: Category Name
children.help_text: Display name for the filter button (supports rich text)

children.name: gallery_blocks
children.label: Gallery Blocks
children.help_text: Add multiple blocks for this category. Each block contains 1-7 images.

children.name: image_items
children.label: Image Items
children.help_text: Add 1-7 images for this block. Images will be arranged in rows.

children.name: button_icon_image
children.label: Button Icon Image
children.help_text: ⚠️ CAUTION: When using image icons, icon colors cannot be changed. The image will display as-is.

children.name: custom_text_color
children.label: Text Color
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: custom_bg_color
children.label: Background Color
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: hover_bg_color
children.label: Hover Background Color
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: hover_text_color
children.label: Hover Text Color
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: custom_border_radius
children.label: Border Radius
children.help_text: In pixels - Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: hover_border_color
children.label: Hover Border Color
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: hover_border_width
children.label: Hover Border Width
children.help_text: In pixels - Leave empty to use theme default (2px)

children.name: button_font
children.label: Font Settings
children.help_text: Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: padding_vertical
children.label: Vertical Padding
children.help_text: In pixels - Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: padding_horizontal
children.label: Horizontal Padding
children.help_text: In pixels - Leave empty to use theme default

children.name: initial_blocks
children.label: Initial Blocks to Show
children.help_text: Number of blocks to display initially (default: 2)

children.name: blocks_per_load
children.label: Blocks to Load Per Click
children.help_text: Number of blocks to load when 'Load More' is clicked
